functions.name: ACCOUNT
functions.description: Returns the BloomAI account summary as a spilled array (broker, account, server, balance, equity, live).

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: Optional API key. If omitted, uses the key saved in the task pane.

functions.name: FLOATINGPNL
functions.description: Returns the current total floating (unrealized) P&L from BloomAI.

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: Optional API key. If omitted, uses the key saved in the task pane.

functions.name: POSITIONS
functions.description: Returns open positions as a spilled array (symbol, direction, lots, entry, sl, tp, pnl, open_time).

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: Optional API key. If omitted, uses the key saved in the task pane.

functions.name: WINRATE
functions.description: Returns the 30-day win rate percentage from BloomAI.

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: Optional API key. If omitted, uses the key saved in the task pane.
